title: SQL Formatter & Beautifier — Format and Beautify SQL Queries
description: Format and beautify SQL queries with proper indentation. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and SQL Server syntax. Syntax highlighting included.

schemas.name: SQL Formatter & Beautifier
schemas.description: Interactive tool to format and beautify SQL queries with syntax highlighting and proper indentation. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and SQL Server.
